Hero.name: I'm Neverson Silva
Hero.description: With over 10 years of experience, I work as a full stack developer specializing in financial solutions, payment systems, and BaaS (Banking as a Service) architecture.

About.subtitle: Developer passionate about technology and innovation
About.heading: Transforming ideas into digital solutions
About.p1: I am a full stack developer with over 7 years of experience, building scalable systems and modern interfaces for different sectors. My trajectory began in the development of applications for virtual learning environments and student portals in a higher education institution (E-learning), evolving into complex corporate platforms and robust integrations.
About.p2_2: , I work as an SR Software Engineer, creating solid architectures and implementing good development practices. I work with technologies such as Node.js, NestJS, React, and Next.js, acting in payment and internet banking solutions and our backoffice.
About.f1_d: Development of complex and scalable systems, integrating digital services and building reliable solutions for different sectors.
About.f2_d: Clean Architecture, DDD, microservices and event-driven design
About.f3_d: Node.js, NestJS, React, Next.js and modern technologies

Experience.subtitle: My trajectory of growth and evolution in technology
Experience.exp1_desc: Focused on developing and maintaining complex integrations with financial services, including payment solutions, digital onboarding, internet banking, and customer service channels. I work with event-driven architectures, secure and scalable APIs, ensuring platform availability and regulatory compliance.
Experience.exp2_desc:
As a Fullstack developer in a Payments squad, I focused on building interfaces and solutions for financial products, including digital accounts, card management, freight payments, and toll tags. I worked on various integration projects with Banking as a Service (Dock), prioritizing responsive interface creation for the company's financial Backoffice in React.js.

Main activities and technologies:

Development of financial backoffice interfaces in React.js, focused on usability and responsiveness.
Implementation of integrations with banking systems and financial services using Node.js and Kotlin, and application monitoring on Azure.
Experience.exp3_desc: Analysis, Development, and maintenance of systems in the Oil and Gas sector.
Experience.exp4_desc:
Development of educational solutions at Kroton Educacional.

Working on maintenance and development of new features in administrative systems using Grails and Groovy, and E-learning Student Portal building services in Nest.js(Node.js) and Spring Boot for integration with the new portal built with ServiceNow and Angular.

Skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I master to create complete solutions
Skills.info_desc: Currently exploring new approaches in front-end, back-end, and artificial intelligence

Contact.subtitle: Interested in working together? Let's talk about your project.
Contact.lets_talk_desc: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your visions.
